name: course-dashboard
description: Local-first course learning dashboard — lecture PDFs to topic study cards

scripts.deploy:desktop: npm run build && rm -rf "/Users/zay/Desktop/Course Dashboard.app" && cp -R "dist-app/mac-arm64/Course Dashboard.app" "/Users/zay/Desktop/Course Dashboard.app" && xattr -cr "/Users/zay/Desktop/Course Dashboard.app"
scripts.package:mac-zip: npm run build && mkdir -p release/mac && rm -rf release/mac && cp -R "dist-app/mac-arm64/Course Dashboard.app" release/mac/ && cp release/INSTALL-Mac.txt release/mac/ && cd release && rm -f Course-Dashboard-mac.zip && zip -r Course-Dashboard-mac.zip mac && cp Course-Dashboard-mac.zip "/Users/zay/Desktop/Course-Dashboard-mac.zip"
